sections.label: Title
sections.guidance: Highlight method novelty and application domain.

sections.label: Abstract
sections.guidance: Summarize method motivation, workflow, validation, and key advantages.

sections.label: Introduction
sections.guidance: Explain problem and why existing methods are insufficient.

sections.label: Methods
sections.guidance: Describe algorithm/protocol components with reproducible detail.

sections.label: Validation
sections.guidance: Report benchmarking strategy and robustness checks.

sections.label: Limitations
sections.guidance: State boundaries and failure modes transparently.

sections.label: Conclusion
sections.guidance: Summarize practical impact and future extensions.

sections.label: References
sections.guidance: Cite baseline and related methods comprehensively.
